front.title: A YANG Data Model for Layer-2 Network Topologies

abstract.t:
This document defines a YANG data model for Layer 2 network topologies.
Editorial Note (To be removed by RFC Editor)
Please update these statements within the document with the RFC number to be assigned to this document:
o "This version of this YANG module is part of RFC XXXX;"
o "RFC XXXX: A YANG Data Model for Layer-2 Network Topologies";
o reference: RFC XXXX
Please update the "revision" date of the YANG module.
